_comment: Aspect catalog — tags placed on cards (static `aspects`) or row-mutable tile stock (`stock`) to describe function. Flat top-level: each entry is a top-level aspect. Sub-aspects are NESTED inside their parent's object; parent relationship is implicit in the JSON tree. Sub-aspects inherit their parent's `icon` AND `color` if they omit them. The recipe matcher (when widened) treats sub-aspects as satisfying their ancestors — a tile carrying `berries` satisfies `{aspect: food, min: 1}`. Storage and `output.modify` consumption stay concrete (slot is declared by leaf name; consume by the same).

flora.description: Living plant matter — trees, bushes, undergrowth

corpus.description: The body — physical capacity and health

corpus--.description: Injuries — wounds, broken bones, lasting harm
